scope.summary: D10 real idle-kill rig now proves both pooled checkout replacement and pinned dispatcher killed-session behavior, plus the no-kill failure probe that catches vacuous lanes.
out_of_scope: No driver repository edits were made.
The shared-checkout host-hygiene failures observed during earlier reruns were caused by concurrent non-D10 peer edits and are not used as close proof.

entry_points.name: D10 positive rig lane
entry_points.trace: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 1200 -- bash scripts/rig/rig.sh idle-kill --log passed in clean worktree /home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-d10-clean-332c2c65. Rig doctor reported 16 checks passed, Free23 readiness passed, pooled checkout replaced killed session 202,12538 -> 202,45625, pinned dispatcher idle-kill ran 1 test, rig_idle_kill passed, host hygiene passed.

entry_points.name: D10 failure-probe rig lane
entry_points.trace: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 1200 -- bash scripts/rig/rig.sh idle-kill-failure-probe --log passed in clean worktree /home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-d10-clean-332c2c65. The pooled no-kill probe failed for the expected 'kill never took effect' signature with same session 206,44270 -> 206,44270; the pinned no-kill probe failed for the expected 'must not remain connected or be silently rebound' signature with victim 231,22844; rig_idle_kill passed and host hygiene passed.

entry_points.name: D10 rig syntax and dry-runs
entry_points.trace: bash -n scripts/rig/rig_idle_kill.sh && bash -n scripts/rig/rig.sh passed. scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 120 -- bash scripts/rig/rig.sh idle-kill --dry-run --log and scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 120 -- bash scripts/rig/rig.sh idle-kill-failure-probe --dry-run --log both passed in the clean worktree.

limitations: The positive pinned dispatcher lane asserts typed refusal after a killed pinned session; A4e's transparent reconnect path is separately covered by oraclemcp-091-a4e-session-recycle-uyujp.
